articles.headline: Why Do Pilots Use The Term "Roger" Instead Of "Yes"?

articles.headline: Towards Environmentally Sustainable Aviation: A Review on Operational Optimization
articles.blurb: Growing air traffic is straining airports and airspace while raising environmental concerns, and demand is only expected to increase. It also highlights emerging trends and gaps for future research in sustainable aviation.
articles.takeaway: Operational optimization through advanced technologies can simultaneously expand airport capacity and reduce environmental impact as air traffic demand accelerates.
keywords: aviation; optimization; operations research; sustainability; environmental impacts
